title: WA CFS Quarterly Trend Sheet- Q2 2025
content: The total biofuel volumes for Q2 2025 stands at 75.69M gallons which is a fall of 22.80% YoY. Most significant reduction is witnessed in Renewable Diesel with a decline of 51.80% YoY. This fall could be attributed to the fall in overall production of Renewable Diesel in US in Q2 2025 due to uncertainty in 45Z Tax Credit. Consequently, this led to a decline in blend ratio of RD to 8.62%.
author: Radhika Khandelwal
